# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- Hunt and Hide game project: Hunter animals are Wolf, Lion, Panther (similar shape for readability). Hider items: Smoke bomb, Decoy, Speed burst. Hunter weapons: Spear (straight line), Bolo (AoE slow), both retrievable. Camera: true isometric (30°). Permanent leaderboard collection per unique username with lightweight identity (localStorage token, no full auth). Follow clean code: SoC, SRP, small files, business logic in services.
